content: Task task-001 completed: Initialized Expo project with TypeScript template. Configured tsconfig.json with strict mode and 12 path aliases (@/components, @/hooks, @/lib, @/screens, @/stores, @/types, @/theme, @/services, @/schemas, @/navigation, @/contexts, @/utils). Set up app.json with bundle identifiers (com.worktracker.app), dark theme, and worktracker:// deep linking scheme. Created src directory structure with barrel export files. Added babel module-resolver for path alias support. Installed web dependencies (react-dom, react-native-web). Verified TypeScript passes (tsc --noEmit) and web export builds successfully.
